/usr/bin/clang++ -O3 -flto=thin -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/bsdfs/diffuse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/cameras/perspective.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/core/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/core/image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/core/instance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/core/integrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/core/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/core/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/core/math.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/core/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/core/plyparser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/core/properties.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/core/registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/core/scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/core/stb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/core/streaming.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/core/tinyexr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/core/transform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/core/xml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/emissions/lambertian.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/integrators/bvh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/integrators/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/integrators/direct.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/integrators/normals.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/lights/envmap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/samplers/independent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/shapes/group.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/shapes/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/shapes/rectangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/shapes/sphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/tests/image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/textures/checkerboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/textures/constant.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unnamed.dir/src/textures/image.cpp.o -o unnamed  deps/miniz/libminiz.a
